message:
test(proptest): add 30 property-based tests for cancellation_safe_channel

Covers TxChannelMetrics/ChannelMetadata serde roundtrips, TxChannelError
display consistency, Reservation commit/rollback/drop semantics, FIFO
ordering, capacity and reservation limit invariants, no-loss guarantees
with mixed operations, ReserveGuard commit/rollback/drop, TxChannelRegistry
operations, and channel ID consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
